title: ✔ Requires:
content:
✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Active Peer Feedback Participation
✔ Does NOT require: Rough Draft or Final Draft.

🎯 Who This Benefits:
• Students who thrive in group discussions and class interaction rather than independent writing.
• Strong verbal processors who develop ideas through discussion.

📜 Path B: The Close Reading & Deep Analysis Path

✔ Heavy focus on close readings and independent research.
✔ Requires:
• Research Proposal
• Annotated Bibliography
• Rough Draft & Final Draft
✔ More flexibility in in-class assignments & discussions.

🎯 Who This Benefits:
• Students who are more comfortable analyzing texts independently.
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 43 (chunk 43/108)
